sections.heading: Primitive and built-in categories
sections.markdown:
- `int` — default signed integer
- `float` — default floating-point number
- `string` — UTF-8 string
- `bool` — `true` / `false`
- `()` — Unit, no return value
- `Array<T>`, `Map<K,V>`, `Set<T>`, `Channel<T>`, `Json`, `Bytes`, `BigInt`
